category_sources: source_facts.description calls it a Kubernetes manifests validator; official README says Kubeconform validates Kubernetes configuration locally or in CI.
display_name_sources: Official docs header and README use Kubeconform; source_facts.name is kubeconform.
docs_sources: Official docs site has Docs, Installation, Usage, Custom Resources support, and related pages; README has full table of contents.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/yannh/kubeconform, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions manifests validator and Custom Resources; official README covers schema locations, CRD support, CI integration, and Helm charts.
